indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can improve mood and productivity.

indicators.name: No obstructions
indicators.rationale: The absence of obstructions allows for a clear and uncluttered workspace.

indicators.name: No furniture
indicators.rationale: The lack of furniture makes it difficult to set up a comfortable and ergonomic workspace.

reasoning_summary: The space is suitable for computer work due to its large open area and natural lighting, but lacks furniture to create a comfortable and ergonomic workspace.
